nl_query: Which bundles have been in SCANNING status for more than 24 hours without reaching COMPLETE, and show the exam hall, bundle code, scanned count, expected count, and the device that last scanned a script in that bundle?
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_id, b.expected_count, b.scanned_count, sh.device_id, sh.scanned_at
FROM   bundle b
JOIN   scan_history  sh ON sh.script_id = b.id
JOIN   answer_script  a ON a.id = sh.script_id
WHERE  b.status = 'OPEN'
  AND  sh.scanned_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND  sh.replaced_previous = FALSE
  AND  b.scanned_count < b.expected_count
GROUP BY b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_id, b.expected_count, b.scanned_count, sh.device_id, sh.scanned_at
ORDER BY scripts_remaining DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: column "scripts_remaining" does not exist
LINE 1: ...scanned_count, sh.device_id, sh.scanned_at HAVING scripts_re...
